title: TCI Express is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: TCI Express is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Join the TCI Express family as a Warehouse Manager in Allahabad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About TCI Express:
TCI Express is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in ERP Systems

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Referral bonus program
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with TCI Express!
